title: Add HAL battery and PMIC telemetry snapshots for app compatibility
description: Why this exists: Meshtastic node_info/status can show battery level, voltage, charging/external-power state, but the current Zephyr HAL only exposes battery/PMIC device presence. What needs to be done: add a board-agnostic HAL telemetry snapshot API with validity flags for battery percent, voltage, charging/external power, and provider availability; feed native LICHEN status and Meshtastic DeviceMetrics from it. Acceptance criteria: no app-visible battery field is fabricated as real telemetry; unknown values are explicit; native_sim and at least one board config test cover absent providers.
notes: Implementation evidence (2026-07-01): added lichen_hal_power_snapshot_get() with explicit provider availability and validity flags; absent providers return success with measured fields invalid/zero and NULL returns -EINVAL. App interface now carries app-owned power snapshots and zeroes status outputs before provider callbacks so omitted optional power fields remain unknown. Gateway /status CBOR emits battery_provider/pmic_provider and only valid measured fields. Meshtastic local info copies HAL snapshot data; DeviceMetrics encodes battery_level only for explicit external_power=true (101) or valid percent 0..100, encodes voltage as fixed32 float volts only when valid, and always includes uptime. Test-only gateway power override is CONFIG_ZTEST-gated and reset between tests. Reviews: multiple independent codereview passes; final three fresh passes (Hegel/Bacon/Kuhn) reported no blocking findings after fixes. Fixed review findings for app status zeroing, fixed32 gateway voltage coverage, positive gateway metric propagation, and out-of-range battery percent omission. Direct EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate: git diff --check passed; native_sim meshtastic_codec 27/27 PASS; native_sim meshtastic_gateway_adapter 17/17 PASS; native_sim app_interface 13/13 PASS. Final Twister on current patch: west twister -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn61-final-native --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen => 6/7 configs passed, 1 static skip, 0 failed, 0 errored, 124 cases executed. HAL qemu_x86 Twister: west twister -T lichen/tests/hal -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn61-final-hal-qemu --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen => 2/3 configs passed, 1 static skip, 0 failed, 0 errored, 12 cases executed. Non-blocking follow-ups created: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.1.1 /status CBOR tests, project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.1.3 provider-backed HAL readings, project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.1.2 physical validation depends on .3.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: HAL power snapshot API, native app status plumbing, Meshtastic DeviceMetrics valid-only battery/voltage/external-power mapping, app-interface zeroing, and native_sim/qemu tests all implemented and validated. Follow-ups created for /status CBOR unit coverage, provider-backed readings, and physical validation.
